title: Sidebar Component
content:
## Sidebar Component The `Sidebar` component is a reusable UI element that provides navigation and user authentication status within the application. It is designed to be collapsible, allowing users to conserve screen space. ### Purpose - **Navigation:** Provides quick access to key sections of the application like the Dashboard, Integrations, and Settings. - **User Authentication:** Displays user information (avatar, name, email) and offers a sign-out option. - **Collapsible UI:** Allows the sidebar to be collapsed to a minimal width, showing only icons, and expanded to reveal full navigation labels and user details. ### Key Features & Exports - **`Sidebar` Component:** The primary export, a React functional component. - **Collapsible Functionality:** Toggles between a collapsed (width `w-16`) and expanded (width `w-60`) state. - **Dynamic Navigation:** Renders navigation items based on the `navItems` array, highlighting the active link using `usePathname`. - **User Integration:** Uses `@clerk/nextjs` hooks (`useUser`, `useClerk`) to display user information and handle sign-out. - **Responsive Design:** Adapts its layout and content visibility based on the `collapsed` state. - **Customizable Styling:** Utilizes `clsx` (`cn`) for conditional class application, allowing for easy theming and styling. ### Usage Example This component is typically used at the root level of a dashboard layout, such as in `app/dashboard/layout.tsx`. ```tsx // app/dashboard/layout.tsx import { Sidebar } from '@/components/ui/sidebar'; export default function DashboardLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) { return (
{children}
); } ``` ### Dependencies - `next/link` - `next/navigation` - `@clerk/nextjs` - `lucide-react` for icons - Shadcn UI components (`Avatar`, `ScrollArea`, `Separator`) - `clsx` and `tailwind-merge` for utility classes (`@/lib/utils`)
